about.title: About
about.heroTitle: Build projects with heart, turn inspiration into reality
about.subtitle: I hope to transform abstract ideas into tangible digital experiences through code, structure, and visual design.
about.ambitionTitle: I want to do more than just code — I want to do something I love.
about.ambitionBody: I care not just whether a feature works, but how information is understood, whether interactions feel natural, whether the interface has order, and whether a product can continue evolving over time. Every line of code I write should express my thoughts and help others have a better experience.
about.originBody: I first loved coding because it quickly turns ideas into reality. A thought, a logic flow, an interface — all can gradually take shape through building and debugging. That process of creating from nothing has kept my passion alive.
about.visionBody: Keep honing the intersection of design sensibility and engineering capability, creating product pages and content systems that balance aesthetics, maintainability, and genuine user experience.
about.ctaTitle: Remember the ambition of youth, once promising to be among the best

items.label: Principle One
items.title: Direction before decoration
items.body: I prefer to first clarify goals, narrative, and information hierarchy, then decide on interface details, so design serves expression, not the other way around.

items.label: Principle Two
items.title: Code is part of the work
items.body: Maintainable, clear, and evolvable implementation directly affects a product's subsequent iteration efficiency and experience stability.

items.label: Principle Three
items.title: Continuous iteration matters more than one-time completion
items.body: I believe in long-term thinking, letting a website gradually develop its own identity through continuous refinement of details and content rhythm.

links.label: Friendly links
links.title: Thanks to those who inspired and helped me.

items.label: Code collaboration
items.title: GitHub
items.body: Recording projects and sharing code is also an important entry point for my continuous learning and observing excellent practices.

items.label: UI foundation
items.title: React
items.body: I use it to organize components, state, and page structure, making interactions more composable and maintainable.

items.label: Skills extension
items.title: Skills
items.body: In the AI era, the Agent's second brain helps me design engineering more efficiently.

items.label: Knowledge community
items.title: Juejin
items.body: A professional tech community that helps me learn, share, and grow.

services.title: Now
services.description: Serving the semiconductor industry, providing secure and highly available semiconductor industry solutions.
Responsible for requirement design, team management, and adoption promotion for computing product line design tools.
Dived into the cybersecurity field, collaborating with top security penetration testing teams to provide professional security assessments and solutions.
For telecom business, providing UI/UX design for operator management platforms and containerized middleware development.
